discussion_summary: Explored the lds-gpt codebase: a Go RAG backend that scrapes LDS scripture + study helps, loads them into a LibSQL knowledge graph via Ent, generates 1024-dim Titan embeddings, and runs parallel kNN + 1-hop graph search. Confirmed with developer: HTTP server deferred, LLM generation deferred, mid-rewrite commit can be ignored, personal use only. Generated INDEX + 7 domain specs.
recommendation: Next phase should pick the first concrete unit of work. Likely candidates: build the deferred HTTP server at cmd/app to wire POST /api/search to the existing DoContextualSearch pipeline, or consolidate the duplicate cmd/app/config and cmd/dataloader/config packages. Frontend is already contract-ready.
